Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x5600 "ASTRALZONE-7000-5600" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $7000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Astral Zone.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $7000 which sets the pointers to the BASIC variable area ($2D/$2E) and end of BASIC ($37/$38). This matches what happens when the original subroutine at $0162 is executed before starting the game.
